svg.text: LeninKart Jira -> GitOps -> ArgoCD Deployment Flow
GUI control-flow view built from the current baseline deployment diagram
Jira progress comments + final transition/comment feedback
Jira ticket creation alone does not auto-dispatch the workflow.
The Jira key is passed into workflow_dispatch explicitly.
Source-truth preserved from the baseline flow:
Jira -> GitHub Actions -> self-hosted runner -> deployment-poc
-> leninkart-infra -> ArgoCD -> k3d cluster -> Jira feedback
